item.title: Copy files in Docker
item.description: Copying files/folders from host to Docker container # docker cp CONTAINER_ID:SOURCE_PATH DESTINATION_PATH docker cp SOURCE_PATH CONTAINER_ID:DESTINATION_PATH In Docker versions prior to 1.8 it was only possible to copy files from a docker container to the host. Not from the host to a docker container. Copy files from host to docker container # To copy a file from host to docker container the below steps. Get the docker container id by using docker ps command:

item.title: Some dockers commands
item.description: Docker images: docker images Run image: docker run -h “HostName” -t -i ImageName /bin/bash Running containers: docker ps All containers: docker ps -a Search image: docker search ImageName Install image: docker pull ImageName Remove container: docker rm IdContainer Delete all containers: docker container prune Delete image: docker rmi ImageId/ImageName Restart container: docker restart ContainerId
